title: Implement empty-log initialization handling
summary: Ensure an empty tx_event_log.jsonl is treated as an initial state, allowing initialization to proceed without errors.
acceptance_criteria: Initialization succeeds when tx_event_log.jsonl exists but is empty.
Empty log is treated equivalently to no events yet.
Baseline tx_state is derived consistently without manual tx_event input.

steps.description: Identify code paths that treat empty logs differently from missing logs.
Implement init-safe handling for empty tx_event_log.jsonl.
Add minimal tests for empty-log initialization behavior.

notes: Keep changes minimal and focused on init handling.
Avoid weakening validation outside initialization scenarios.
